title: Add a changelog table to the About page (Root Admin only)
details: Logs notable changes after v1.0.0, read from the project's CHANGELOG.json file.

title: Reduce Vercel Active CPU for the live scoreboard
details: Switch the public scoreboard to a CDN-cached JSON poll every 5s instead of router.refresh() every 500ms (eliminating full server re-renders); narrow the middleware matcher to gated routes only; throttle the official cookie re-sign; add a 5-minute trust window to the auth JWT callback; widen official-workspace polling to 2-2.5s.

title: Refresh all docs/ to match the current implementation
details: Rewrote 59 files from the old "UI prototype (mock)" framing to the real system: Prisma backend, Server Actions + revalidate, CDN-cached scoreboard, auth/session and secret-code join; removed the nonexistent TIMEKEEPER role/route.
